title: The Black Umbrella
content: After a rainy afternoon, Sophie found a black umbrella outside her apartment door. None of her neighbors claimed it. She placed a small note in the building asking if anyone had lost one. Two days later, an elderly man knocked on her door. He explained that he had accidentally left the umbrella there while helping another resident carry groceries. He thanked Sophie for her honesty. A simple forgotten umbrella had become a small neighborhood mystery.
